text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I can't stop thinking about this limited-time
"Become Number One! Super Stamina Beef Bowl."

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it has "number one" in its name! It's a
match made in heaven!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But... it is a lot of food. It might be too heavy to eat right before a race...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But, but! I can't pass up on first place! Me, of all
people!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Argh! I don't know what to do!
choice_data_list:
The race should be your number one priority!
Stay strong!
Eat like a champion and become number one!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're right! Being number one on the track
comes before any beef bowl!
choice_data_list: We can have it to celebrate your win.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I like your style! It'll be the first thing I do!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're right! I'll eat it and just burn it off! And if
it helps me win, then even better!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That settles it. Let's see if this will really make me
number one!
